name: Arsan Tekstil Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi
summary: Arsan Tekstil Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells yarns in Turkey. It offers open-end, carded ring, and combed yarns of cotton; acrylic, cotton/acrylic, and cotton/polyester; and corespun, compact, and regenerated fiber yarns. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Kahramanmaras, Turkey.
